statement: When not shipping code, I'm deep in a game of Mafia, watching too many episodes of something, or nursing a strong tea before 9 AM.

pursuits.title: Mind & Social Games
pursuits.body: Mafia, interactive party games, puzzles. Monopoly Deal and Uno No Mercy are staples.

pursuits.title: Valorant
pursuits.body: Play occasionally with friends. Competitive enough to care, casual enough to keep it fun.

pursuits.title: TV & Cinema
pursuits.body: Marvel through Phase 4, DC (big Batman fan — loved Peacemaker). Game of Thrones, House of the Dragon. Sitcoms: The Office, Brooklyn 99, HIMYM, Big Bang Theory.

pursuits.title: Tea & Slow Mornings
pursuits.body: Strong tea, no rush. The best ideas have all shown up before 9 AM.
